segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: Hello Charlotte.
segments.zh: 你好，夏洛特。我是凯登，主管之一。欢迎加入团队。

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: I'm Kaeden, one of the supervisors.

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: Welcome to the team.

segments.speaker: CHARLOTTE
segments.en: Hi Aiden.
segments.zh: 嗨，艾登。

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: It's Kaeden.
segments.zh: 是凯登。

segments.speaker: CHARLOTTE
segments.en: I'm so sorry.
segments.zh: 非常抱歉。

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: Don't worry.
segments.zh: 别担心。人们经常叫错我的名字；他们总不知道怎么拼写。是K-A-E-D-E-N，万一你需要写的话。我会尽量记住的。

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: People often get my name wrong; they never know how to spell it.

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: It's K-A-E-D-E-N, in case you ever need to write it.

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: I'll try and remember.

segments.speaker: CHARLOTTE
segments.en: So, there are a few practical things you need to sort out this morning.
segments.zh: 所以，今天早上有几件实际的事情你需要处理。然后我会告诉你今天要做什么。

segments.speaker: CHARLOTTE
segments.en: Then I'll show you what you're going to do today.

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: The email I received said to go to the front desk, to show my letter of appointment and pick up my badge.
segments.zh: 我收到的邮件说要去前台，出示我的任命书并领取我的工牌。你需要它进入员工休息室和超市其他顾客不允许进入的区域。所以，你在前台办完后，我会带你去员工休息室。把你的外套和背包放在那里的一个储物柜里。随便选一个空的。

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: You'll need that for the staffroom and other areas of the supermarket where shoppers aren't allowed.

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: So, after you've finished at the front desk, I'll take you to the staffroom.

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: Put your coat and rucksack in one of the lockers there.

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: Take whichever one is free.

segments.speaker: CHARLOTTE
segments.en: Will I have a key?
segments.zh: 我会有一把钥匙吗？

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: Yes.
segments.zh: 好的，尽量别弄丢了。下班的时候，把它放在门里留给下一个人用。

words.w: at the end of the day

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: Try not to lose it.

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: At the end of the day, leave it in the door for the next person to use.

segments.speaker: CHARLOTTE
segments.en: Will do.
segments.zh: 好的。

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: You also need to go to the HR department to see Tiffany.
segments.zh: 你还需要去人力资源部找蒂芙尼。她人很好。我被告知要带上护照。人力资源部需要记下护照号码。

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: She's really helpful.

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: I was told to bring my passport with me.

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: HR need to take a note of the number in it.

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: That's right.
segments.zh: 对。或者你可以出示身份证。

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: Or you can show your ID card.

segments.speaker: CHARLOTTE
segments.en: I don't have one of those.
segments.zh: 我没有身份证。

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 好的。蒂芙尼会给你一套制服。他们有很多不同尺码的，你直接告诉她你需要什么就行。我不跟你去人力资源部了——我得去处理别的事情。面包切片机出了点问题。

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: Tiffany will give you a uniform.

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: They have lots in different sizes, so you just tell her what you need.

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: I won't come with you to HR – I've got to go and sort something else out.

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: Problem with a bread slicer.

segments.speaker: CHARLOTTE
segments.en: Is the HR office near the staffroom?
segments.zh: 人力资源办公室在员工休息室附近吗？

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: The staffroom's on the first floor, and HR are a couple of floors above that, on the third floor.
segments.zh: 员工休息室在一楼，人力资源部在上面几层，三楼。员工休息室外面有楼梯。

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: There's a staircase outside the staffroom.

segments.speaker: CHARLOTTE
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 好的。

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: When you've finished with HR, come and find me in the bakery section of the shop.
segments.zh: 你办完人事手续后，到店里的面包区来找我。

segments.speaker: CHARLOTTE
segments.en: I'm looking forward to getting started.
segments.zh: 我很期待开始工作。

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: I'll just give you my phone number, in case you can't find me.
segments.zh: 我把我的电话号码给你，万一你找不到我。你手机带了吗？

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: Have you got your phone there?

segments.speaker: CHARLOTTE
segments.en: Yes . . .
segments.zh: 带了……好，准备好了。

segments.speaker: CHARLOTTE
segments.en: OK, ready.

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: It's oh-four-one-two double-six-five nine-oh-three.

segments.speaker: CHARLOTTE
segments.en: OK, done.
segments.zh: 好的，记下了。

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: So, Charlotte, your tasks today are in the bakery section, on the sushi counter, and on the meat and fish counters.
segments.zh: 那么，夏洛特，你今天的工作区域是面包区、寿司柜台，还有肉和鱼柜台。第一项任务是检查面包和蛋糕的保质期。如果日期是今天的，就在包装上贴新的价格标签。

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: The first job is to check sell-by dates on the bread and cakes.

segments.speaker: KAEDEN
segments.en: If any of the dates are today's, put a new price label on the packaging.

segments.speaker: CHARLOTTE
segments.en: What if any of the labels are yesterday's dates, or older?
segments.zh: 如果标签上有昨天的日期或者更早的日期，我是不是该把这些东西扔掉？

segments.speaker: CHARLOTTE
segments.en: Do I throw those items away?

pairs.note: 题干问主管名字，原文直接给出名字 Kaeden，完全对应。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问 supervisor 的名字，定位句直接说 'It's Kaeden'，所以答案就是 Kaeden。

items.prompt: Where to leave coat and bag:

pairs.note: 原文用'put'替换了'leave'，'rucksack'替换了'bag'，意思相同。

pairs.p: in one of the lockers there
pairs.note: 原文明确说明放在lockers里，直接对应答案。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句说'Put your coat and rucksack in one of the lockers there'，其中'lockers'就是答案，'put...in'对应'leave...where'。

items.prompt: See Tiffany in HR: to give number

pairs.p: take a note of the number
pairs.note: 题干说'给号码'，原文说'记下号码'，意思相同，但表达方式不同。
答案词在原文中直接出现，是原词复现。

paraphrase.explain: 题干要求去HR见Tiffany并给号码，原文提到需要带护照，HR要记下护照号码，因此答案就是passport。

pairs.note: collect 和 give you 都表示得到物品，但方向相反：collect 是去拿，give you 是别人给你。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问需要收集什么，原文说 Tiffany 会给你一件 uniform，所以 uniform 是答案。

items.prompt: Location of HR office: on floor

pairs.note: 题干HR office对应原文HR，是缩写与全称的替换。
题干问楼层，原文直接给出具体楼层。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到HR在第三层，直接对应题干问的楼层。

pairs.note: 题干问主管手机号，原文直接读出数字，逐字对应。

paraphrase.explain: 原文直接读出手机号，与题干关键词'mobile number'对应，定位后记录数字。

items.prompt: Collect for the fish from the cold-room
